provenance.notes: Binary audio is not checked in yet. This fixture is reserved for a tiny synthetic drum-loop style WAV generated inside the repository or acquired under a permissive license with equivalent properties.

expected_characteristics: short enough for fast integration runs

acquisition_or_generation_plan: Generate a 4-second stereo WAV fixture under 100 KB if feasible using deterministic repository tooling.
If synthesis is not ready, replace with a small redistributable CC0 or equivalent licensed WAV and update provenance fields in the same change.
Keep the stored relative path stable so integration artifacts do not drift.
